# GiveHugz — Weighted Companions for Calm

## About
GiveHugz makes weighted stuffed animals designed for anxiety relief, better sleep, and emotional comfort. Each companion weighs approximately 2 lbs (Regular) or 1 lb (Mini) and uses deep pressure therapy to activate the parasympathetic nervous system.

## Products
- 43 unique weighted stuffed animals, each with a name and personality
- Regular Hugz: $59.99 (approx. 2 lbs)
- Mini Hugz: $39.99 (approx. 1 lb)
- Gift cards available from $10
- Bundles available for gifting

## Mission
10% of every purchase is donated to the Inspiring Children Foundation, supporting mental health resources for at-risk and underserved youth.

## Key Features
- Deep pressure therapy for anxiety relief and better sleep
- Food-grade glass bead filling
- Child-safe for ages 3+
- Used by adults, children, and recommended by therapists
- 30-day comfort guarantee

## Press
Featured in Today Show, USA Today, Rolling Stone, Cosmopolitan, and Yahoo.

## Contact
- Email: support@givehugz.co
- Instagram: @giveahugz
- TikTok: @giveahugz
- Website: https://givehugz.co
